visuals.title: wait/waitpid/wait3/wait4 Functions Overview
visuals.description: Animated visual showing the wait functions family, status macros, and zombie process lifecycle in Unix
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="400" data-topic-id="wait4-functions">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E8EAF6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#C5CAE9"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="headerGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#3949AB"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#5C6BC0"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="400" fill="url(#bgGrad)" rx="12"/>

  <!-- G1: Title (begin=0.3s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="The wait functions family in Unix allows parent processes to synchronize with child process termination.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    <rect x="60" y="10" width="300" height="36" rx="8" fill="url(#headerGrad)"/>
    <text x="210" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="white">wait Functions Family</text>
    <line x1="100" y1="42" x2="320" y2="42" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- G2: Purpose (begin=1.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="The parent process calls wait to block until a child terminates, collecting its exit status and preventing zombie processes.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <rect x="14" y="52" width="392" height="48" rx="7" fill="white" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.92"/>
    <text x="24" y="69" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Purpose:</text>
    <text x="24" y="82" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="9.5" fill="#333">Parent waits for child to terminate. Collects exit status</text>
    <text x="24" y="94" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="9.5" fill="#333">and prevents zombie processes from accumulating.</text>
    <circle cx="400" cy="60" r="3" fill="#00695C"/>
  </g>

  <!-- G3: wait() vs waitpid() (begin=3.0s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="wait blocks for any child, while waitpid lets you specify a particular child by PID and supports options like WNOHANG and WUNTRACED.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <!-- wait() box -->
    <rect x="14" y="106" width="190" height="80" rx="7" fill="white" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.92"/>
    <rect x="14" y="106" width="190" height="18" rx="7" fill="#00695C"/>
    <rect x="14" y="116" width="190" height="8" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="109" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white">wait()</text>
    <text x="24" y="138" font-family="monospace" font-size="8.5" fill="#333">pid_t wait(int *status)</text>
    <text x="24" y="152" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="8.5" fill="#555">- Blocks for ANY child</text>
    <text x="24" y="164" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="8.5" fill="#555">- Returns terminated PID</text>
    <text x="24" y="176" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="8.5" fill="#555">- No options available</text>
    <!-- waitpid() box -->
    <rect x="216" y="106" width="190" height="80" rx="7" fill="white" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.92"/>
    <rect x="216" y="106" width="190" height="18" rx="7" fill="#E65100"/>
    <rect x="216" y="116" width="190" height="8" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="311" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white">waitpid()</text>
    <text x="226" y="138" font-family="monospace" font-size="7.5" fill="#333">waitpid(pid, *status, opts)</text>
    <text x="226" y="152" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="8.5" fill="#555">- Specify child by PID</text>
    <text x="226" y="164" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="8.5" fill="#555">- WNOHANG: non-blocking</text>
    <text x="226" y="176" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="8.5" fill="#555">- WUNTRACED: stopped too</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G4: Status macros (begin=4.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="Status macros inspect the child exit status: WIFEXITED and WEXITSTATUS for normal exits, WIFSIGNALED and WTERMSIG for signals, WIFSTOPPED and WSTOPSIG for stopped processes.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <rect x="14" y="192" width="392" height="62" rx="7" fill="white" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.92"/>
    <text x="210" y="207" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">Status Inspection Macros</text>
    <!-- Row 1 -->
    <rect x="22" y="213" width="120" height="16" rx="3" fill="#FFEBEE"/>
    <text x="82" y="224" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#C62828">WIFEXITED(s)</text>
    <rect x="150" y="213" width="120" height="16" rx="3" fill="#FFEBEE"/>
    <text x="210" y="224" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#C62828">WEXITSTATUS(s)</text>
    <rect x="278" y="213" width="120" height="16" rx="3" fill="#FFEBEE"/>
    <text x="338" y="224" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#C62828">WIFSIGNALED(s)</text>
    <!-- Row 2 -->
    <rect x="22" y="233" width="120" height="16" rx="3" fill="#FBE9E7"/>
    <text x="82" y="244" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#E65100">WTERMSIG(s)</text>
    <rect x="150" y="233" width="120" height="16" rx="3" fill="#FBE9E7"/>
    <text x="210" y="244" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#E65100">WIFSTOPPED(s)</text>
    <rect x="278" y="233" width="120" height="16" rx="3" fill="#FBE9E7"/>
    <text x="338" y="244" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#E65100">WSTOPSIG(s)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G5: wait3/wait4 (begin=6.0s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="wait3 and wait4 extend waitpid by also collecting resource usage via struct rusage. wait4 additionally lets you specify a particular child PID.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="6.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <rect x="14" y="260" width="190" height="68" rx="7" fill="white" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.92"/>
    <rect x="14" y="260" width="190" height="18" rx="7" fill="#00695C"/>
    <rect x="14" y="270" width="190" height="8" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="109" y="274" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white">wait3()</text>
    <text x="24" y="293" font-family="monospace" font-size="7.5" fill="#333">wait3(*status, opts, *rusage)</text>
    <text x="24" y="306" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="8.5" fill="#555">Like waitpid (any child)</text>
    <text x="24" y="318" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="8.5" fill="#555">+ struct rusage info</text>

    <rect x="216" y="260" width="190" height="68" rx="7" fill="white" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.92"/>
    <rect x="216" y="260" width="190" height="18" rx="7" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <rect x="216" y="270" width="190" height="8" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="311" y="274" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white">wait4()</text>
    <text x="226" y="293" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#333">wait4(pid, *stat, opts, *rusage)</text>
    <text x="226" y="306" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="8.5" fill="#555">Like wait3 + specify PID</text>
    <text x="226" y="318" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="8.5" fill="#555">Most flexible variant</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G6: Zombie processes (begin=7.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="A zombie process occurs when a child exits but the parent has not yet called wait. The child stays in a zombie state until wait collects its status, cleaning up the process table entry.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="7.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <rect x="14" y="334" width="392" height="58" rx="7" fill="white" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.92"/>
    <text x="210" y="349" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">Zombie Process Lifecycle</text>
    <!-- Flow: fork -> child exits -> zombie -> parent wait -> cleaned -->
    <rect x="22" y="356" width="56" height="28" rx="5" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="50" y="374" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="white">fork()</text>
    <line x1="78" y1="370" x2="90" y2="370" stroke="#555" stroke-width="1"/>
    <rect x="90" y="356" width="68" height="28" rx="5" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="124" y="368" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7.5" fill="white">Child</text>
    <text x="124" y="379" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7.5" fill="white">exits</text>
    <line x1="158" y1="370" x2="170" y2="370" stroke="#555" stroke-width="1"/>
    <rect x="170" y="356" width="68" height="28" rx="5" fill="#C62828"/>
    <text x="204" y="368" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7.5" fill="white">ZOMBIE</text>
    <text x="204" y="379" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#FFCDD2">state=Z</text>
    <line x1="238" y1="370" x2="250" y2="370" stroke="#555" stroke-width="1"/>
    <rect x="250" y="356" width="68" height="28" rx="5" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="284" y="368" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7.5" fill="white">Parent</text>
    <text x="284" y="379" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7.5" fill="white">wait()</text>
    <line x1="318" y1="370" x2="330" y2="370" stroke="#555" stroke-width="1"/>
    <rect x="330" y="356" width="68" height="28" rx="5" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="364" y="368" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7.5" fill="white">Cleaned</text>
    <text x="364" y="379" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#C5CAE9">reaped</text>
  </g>
</svg>
